text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Zoomie, zoom, zoooom! Ehehe, that<n>felt great!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! What'd you think of my run<n>just now? I
call it the "Long Shot's<n>Dash"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was reading this manga yesterday,<n>and there
was an Umamusume named<n>"Long Shot" in it!
She stole the show<n>with her speedy dash!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone was super shocked by herrunning, and she was sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been copying her<n>the whooole
day! And, and!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
N-now I'm super tired... Trying to be<n>Long Shot
sure is tough!
choice_data_list: Tell her to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So they called her "Long Shot"<n>because she won
even though<n>nobody thought she had a shot at<n>
victory, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait! So does that mean peoplewill call me Long Shot if I win?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've never come in first<n>before!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna do my bestest,<n>and then
someday, I'll be Long Shot<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. You can't run if<n>you've got
no energy, huh!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's enough training for today! I'm<n>gonna go
home and have some fun! ♪
